title: What is the writer's carpet made of?

meanings.usage: 指铺在地上的织物，这里幽默地指书堆成的地面
修饰动词，表示暂时的状态
指长时间地盯着看，常与at连用
表示所有权，强调个人拥有
in order表示整齐有序；out of order表示杂乱
长度单位，常用于测量较小距离
指房间的地面，floor space指地板空间
用于强调事实或真实情况

phrases.usage: 表示整齐有序，井井有条

examples.en: I have been trying to get my new room in order.
examples.zh: 我一直在努力整理我的新房间。

examples.en: Let's put these papers in order.
examples.zh: 让我们把这些文件整理整齐。

phrases.usage: 更糟糕的是，用来引出使情况更糟的因素

examples.en: To make matters worse, the room is rather small.
examples.zh: 更糟糕的是，房间相当小。

examples.en: It was raining, and to make matters worse, my car broke down.
examples.zh: 天在下雨，更糟糕的是，我的车坏了。

phrases.usage: 此刻；目前，与现在进行时连用

examples.en: At the moment, they cover every inch of floor space.
examples.zh: 此刻，它们覆盖了地板的每一寸空间。

examples.en: I'm very busy at the moment.
A short while ago, my sister helped me to carry one of my old bookcases up the stairs.
examples.zh: 刚才，我妹妹帮我把一个旧书架抬上楼梯。

examples.en: A short while ago, he was still a student.
I have to walk on them to get in or out of the room.
examples.zh: 我不得不踩着它们进出房间。

examples.en: You can sit here in your spare time and read the carpet!
examples.zh: 你可以在空闲时间坐在这里'读'地毯！

grammar.title: 现在完成进行时 (Present Perfect Continuous)
grammar.definition: 表示动作从过去开始，一直持续到现在，可能还在进行或刚刚结束。常与all morning/all day/just等时间状语连用。
grammar.structure: 主语 + have/has + been + 动词-ing形式
grammar.usage: 强调动作的持续性，常用时间状语有：all morning, all day, for + 时间段, since + 时间点

examples.en: I have been working hard all morning.
examples.zh: 我整个上午一直在努力工作。

examples.en: I have been trying to get my new room in order.
examples.zh: 我一直在努力整理我的新房间。

examples.en: She has been waiting for you for two hours.
examples.zh: 她已经等了你两个小时了。

grammar.title: to make matters worse
grammar.definition: 插入语，用来引出使已经不好的情况更加糟糕的信息
grammar.structure: to make matters worse, + 句子
grammar.usage: 用于引出更糟糕的情况，通常前面已经描述了一个不太好的情况

examples.en: To make matters worse, the room is rather small.
examples.zh: 更糟糕的是，房间相当小。

examples.en: It was cold, and to make matters worse, it started to rain.
examples.zh: 天气很冷，更糟糕的是，开始下雨了。

grammar.title: be made of 询问材质
grammar.definition: 用 be made of 提问，of后接材料名词，用于询问某物是由什么制成的
grammar.structure: What is + 主语 + made of?
grammar.usage: 询问物品的原材料或组成成分

examples.en: What is the writer's carpet made of?
examples.zh: 作家的'地毯'是什么做的？

examples.en: What is this table made of?
What is your jacket made of?
examples.zh: 你的夹克是什么材质的？

sentencePatterns.pattern: What is + 主语 + made of?

original.en: What is the writer's carpet made of?
original.zh: 作家的'地毯'是什么做的？

imitations.en: What is this dress made of?
imitations.zh: 这条裙子是什么材质的？

imitations.en: What is your new house made of?
imitations.zh: 你的新房子是什么结构的？

sentencePatterns.pattern: I have been + 动词-ing + 时间/all day/morning...

original.en: I have been working hard all morning.
original.zh: 我整个上午一直在努力工作。

imitations.en: I have been studying English all day.
She has been cooking since morning.
imitations.zh: 她从早上就开始做饭了。

sentencePatterns.pattern: to make matters worse, + 句子

original.en: To make matters worse, the room is rather small.
original.zh: 更糟糕的是，房间相当小。

imitations.en: To make matters worse, I lost my wallet.
imitations.zh: 更糟糕的是，我把钱包弄丢了。

imitations.en: To make matters worse, there was no taxi available.
imitations.zh: 更糟糕的是，没有出租车可用。

sentencePatterns.pattern: You can + 动词 + in your spare time

original.en: You can sit here in your spare time and read the carpet!
original.zh: 你可以在空闲时间坐在这里'读'地毯！

imitations.en: You can read books in your spare time.
imitations.zh: 你可以在空闲时间看书。

imitations.en: You can practice English in your spare time.
imitations.zh: 你可以在空闲时间练习英语。
